items.title: Assisted Dying Bill Passed by Jersey Assembly
items.description: Jersey has approved assisted dying legislation, but delays to royal assent in the Isle of Man have raised constitutional concerns. Press Association

items.title: Residents With Children Are at a Financial Breaking Point
items.description: As childcare costs soar and pay lags behind inflation, residents are forced into impossible choices about family and training. Medscape Medical News
